description: A finance-master record proposing a capital asset for acquisition, classified for the fixed-asset register. It uses a composite natural key (financeBook + assetClassCode + proposalNo). When a requisition is a capital (CAPEX) buy, it references an asset proposal so the eventual PO and goods receipt post to the right finance book and asset class rather than to expense. Maintainable individually or by bulk import (natural-key upsert by the composite key, master label 'asset proposals').

fields.name: financeBook
fields.label: Finance Book
fields.validation: non-blank; part 1 of the composite natural key (financeBook + assetClassCode + proposalNo); the set of accounting books (e.g. statutory, tax)
fields.purpose: The accounting book the asset capitalizes into (statutory/tax/IFRS); the first key part that, with assetClassCode and proposalNo, uniquely identifies the proposal and routes the posting to the correct ledger.

fields.name: assetClassCode
fields.label: Asset Class
fields.validation: non-blank; part 2 of the composite natural key; the fixed-asset class (e.g. plant, vehicle, IT-equipment) driving the depreciation schedule
fields.purpose: The fixed-asset class the proposal belongs to; the second key part that determines the depreciation rule and groups assets in the register.

fields.name: proposalNo
fields.label: Proposal No.
fields.validation: non-blank; part 3 of the composite natural key; the running proposal number, unique within (financeBook, assetClassCode)
fields.purpose: The running number completing the composite key; the human reference a CAPEX requisition cites so the capital spend ties to a specific asset proposal.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Asset Description
fields.purpose: The readable name of the proposed asset shown when a requisition selects a CAPEX proposal; the display field for the reference.

fields.name: estimatedCost
fields.label: Estimated Cost
fields.validation: > 0; the budgeted capital cost; carries currency
fields.purpose: The budgeted capital cost of the asset; the figure the capital budget check and the CAPEX approval threshold test against before the requisition can proceed.

fields.name: estimatedCostInBase
fields.label: Estimated Cost (Base Currency)
fields.validation: FX-converted via convertToBase; graceful degradation to original on FX failure
fields.purpose: The normalized capital cost that drives the CAPEX threshold and capital-budget check across currencies (axiom A12); the comparable figure for capital-spend analytics.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: DRAFT -> APPROVED -> CAPITALIZED (on asset go-live) | REJECTED; only APPROVED proposals selectable on a CAPEX requisition
fields.purpose: The proposal lifecycle position; gates whether the proposal can back a CAPEX requisition (APPROVED) and marks when the asset is capitalized in the register (CAPITALIZED).

invariants: A12 estimated cost normalized to base currency for the CAPEX threshold/analytics
A13 audit + SSE on every committed master change
composite natural key (financeBook + assetClassCode + proposalNo) is unique; the bulk-import upsert key
only APPROVED proposals selectable on a CAPEX requisition
